About MEGHA Studio

A Studio Built on Story, Craft & Code.

MEGHA Studio was founded with a single belief — that great brands are built at the intersection of narrative, design, and technology. From breaking news to brand identity systems and cinematic video content, we orchestrate every channel into one cohesive voice.

  • Unified News, Design & Video teams under one creative roof
  • Automated YouTube feed integration with editorial curation
  • Filtered design gallery with categorized CMS workflow
  • Direct client inquiry pipeline with project briefing forms

What We Do

Services That Compound Your Brand

Three specialized verticals — News Portal, Creative Design Studio, and Video Hub — engineered to amplify each other and grow your audience across every channel.

News Portal CMS

A categorized news platform with editorial workflow, SEO optimization, and real-time publishing. From breaking stories to evergreen features.

Learn more

Brand Identity Design

Logos, type systems, color theory, and visual language. We craft identities that scale from business card to billboard without losing soul.

Learn more

YouTube Video Hub

Automated YouTube feed integration with curated playlists, custom thumbnails, and channel analytics — all embedded natively on your site.

Learn more

Editorial & Content

Long-form articles, brand journalism, scriptwriting, and editorial calendars. We turn your expertise into stories people actually read.

Learn more

Motion & Animation

Title sequences, explainer animations, logo stings, and social motion graphics. Static design comes alive through cinematic motion.

Learn more

Strategy & Consulting

Content strategy, channel positioning, audience research, and brand architecture. We help you decide what to make and why.

Learn more

Why MEGHA Studio

Six Reasons Brands Choose Us

  • Unified Creative Team

    News editors, brand designers, and video producers sit in the same studio. No handoff friction — just one team, one vision, executed end-to-end.

  • Automated YouTube Integration

    Your latest videos auto-sync to your site within minutes of going live. No copy-paste, no broken embeds, no stale thumbnails.

  • Categorized News CMS

    A purpose-built editorial CMS with categories, tags, scheduled publishing, SEO previews, and writer workflows designed for newsrooms.

  • Filtered Design Gallery

    Visitors filter your portfolio by category, year, or client in real time. Quick-view modals reduce friction and surface your best work faster.

  • Direct Client Inquiry Pipeline

    A built-in contact form routes inquiries to the right team — design, editorial, or video — with project briefs structured for fast response.

  • Cinematic, Mobile-First UX

    Every page is engineered for delight — animated transitions, depth-layered heroes, and scroll storytelling that work flawlessly on any screen.

Client Love

What Our Partners Say

A few words from founders, marketing leads, and creative directors who've trusted MEGHA Studio with their brand stories.

"MEGHA Studio rebuilt our entire brand — news portal, design system, and YouTube channel — under one roof. The unified approach saved us six months of vendor wrangling and the result is genuinely cinematic. Our conversion rate is up 38%."

Arjun Mehta Founder, Aurora Tech

"Their design portfolio CMS is a game-changer. We finally have a gallery that filters, sorts, and showcases our work the way we always wanted. The quick-view modal alone has doubled our average session duration. Worth every rupee."

Priya Sharma Creative Director, Bloom

"The YouTube auto-feed integration is brilliant. Our latest video shows up on the site within minutes — no manual embedding, no broken links. Combined with their motion design work, our channel grew 3x in six months. Truly a full-service studio."

Rohan Kapoor Marketing Lead, Pulse Fitness
